resources:
NSClient BG NS BG Downloads BG data from Nightscout xDrip+ BG Receive BG values from xDrip+ and compatible apps (Juggluco etc.). BYODA BYODA Receive BG values from the \'Build Your Own Dexcom App\'. Glimp Receive BG values from Glimp. MM640g Receive BG values from the 600SeriesAndroidUploader. Poctech Receive BG values from Poctech app Glunovo Receive values from Glunovo app Intelligo Receive values from Intelligo app Tomato (MiaoMiao) Tomato Receive BG values from Tomato app (MiaoMiao device) Random BG Generate random BG data (Demo mode only) BG
BG source settings Accept sensor start Create event \"CGM Sensor Insert\" in Careportal automatically on received sensor start from BG source local broadcast direction BG generation interval minutes
Syai Receive glucose data from Syai/Ottai App.
SI App Receive glucose data from Patched Sibionic SI App.
Sino App Receive glucose data from Patched Sino App.
Notification Reader Read glucose values from notifications posted by official CGM apps (Dexcom, Medtronic, Eversense, etc.).
Dexcom CGM Application needs permission to receive CGM data from Dexcom app Notification Access Required to read glucose values from CGM app notifications
Eversense Eversense E3/365 driver Information Connected Battery percentage Insertion date Last synchronisation Calibration Phase Last calibration Next calibration Calibrate transmitter Use ESEL Smoothing
Not connected Eversense 365 credentials Username Password Not set Set (hidden)
Select Eversense transmitter Cancel Unknown device
Ready to calibrate Calibration status Blood glucose value Enter BG value Submit calibration Please enter a valid blood glucose value Calibration submission is not yet supported by the Eversense SDK Note: Calibration submission requires a future SDK update. The UI is ready but the submit action is not yet functional. Calibration submitted successfully Failed to submit calibration. Make sure the transmitter is connected and ready. Tap to trigger a full sync Placement signal Transmitter Placement Transmitter Placement Guide Adjust your transmitter position\nto improve signal strength Excellent Good Fair Weak Poor Great placement! Keep the transmitter in this position. Good placement. Signal is strong. Signal is acceptable. Try moving the transmitter slightly for a better reading. Weak signal. Reposition the transmitter closer to the sensor. Poor signal. Make sure the transmitter is placed directly over the sensor site. Connect to your transmitter to view signal strength. Reading…`n Transmitter Connected Your transmitter is connected. Make sure it is positioned directly over your sensor site and secured with the adhesive patch. Sending calibration… Release for Official App Disconnect so the official Eversense app can connect. AAPS will reconnect every 5 minutes automatically. Released — AAPS reconnecting every 5 minutes… Coexistence Mode Automatically disconnect after each sync to give the official Eversense app time to connect and upload data Eversense transmitter not detecting — check placement Make sure the transmitter is placed directly over the sensor site and secured with the adhesive patch.
